title: carex arenaria var. repens
intro: Carex arenaria var. repens, also known as creeping grey sedge, is a low-growing, spreading plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex arenaria var. repens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
